cleanup_response.message: Sandbox destroyed. All evidence has been eliminated.

evidence: Install command returned non-zero exit code (1)
python setup.py egg_info did not run successfully
final_verdict.summary: Possible manager/package mismatch (known_npm_package_used_with_pip). Re-test with the likely correct manager before treating as malware.

  ╰─> [17 lines of output]

      !!
      
              ********************************************************************************
              Usage of dash-separated 'description-file' will not be supported in future
              versions. Please use the underscore name 'description_file' instead.
              (Affected: lodash).
      
              This deprecation is overdue, please update your project and remove deprecated

              ********************************************************************************
      
      !!

note: This is an issue with the package mentioned above, not pip.
